An ordinance relating to the vacation


of streets and alleys in the First


subdivision of Block "a" of Third


Sinto Addition. and Addition to Sec


ond Sinto Addition to the City of


Spokane, Washington.


Whereas. The owners of all the real
estate abutting upon the streets and
alleys in this ordinance sought to be
vacated have petitioned the city coun-
ell to make such vacation, and the
council, upon November -. 1903, did
by resolution fix upon December -,
1908. as the date when said petition
should be heard and determined, and
the city clerk gave more than twenty
days notice of the tendency of said
petition in the manner prescribed by
law, and said hearing having been had
| on the date fixed ass above, now,
therefore


The City of Spokane does ordain as
follows:


Section 1. strip comprising the
southernmost rs feet of Cataldo ave-
nue. from the west line OF Dakota
street, in First Subdivision of Block
"A" of Third Snto Addition to a
point 6.15 feet east of the west line
of Hamilton street, in Addition to
Second Sinto Addition, is hereby va
Gated


Sec. 2. A strip comprising the
southernmost Is feet of CataldO ave-
nue. from a point 1925 feet west of
the east line of Hamilton street to a
point 25 feet east of the west line of
Superior street. all In Addition to
Second Sinto Addition, is hereby va
Gated.


Sec. 3. All of Dakota street from
the south line Of Cataldo avenue to
the north line of the right Of way of
the Oregon Railway & Navigation

Sec 8. All Of a certain unnamed

dition to Second Sinto Addition. is

Sec. .. All Of the following alleys
in First Subdivision of Block "a Of
Third Sinto Addition, to-wit: The
alley lying between the eastern and
western tiers of lots in blocks 46 and
40 thereof. and the alley lying be-
tween the eastern and western tiers
of lots In blocks AZ and 4S thereof,
are hereby vacated.


Sec. 10. All of the following alleys
in Addition to Second Sinto Addition.
to-wit: The alley lying between the
eastern and western tiers of lots in
block As thereof. and the alley lying

vacated.


Sec. II. This ordinance shall take
effect and be in force five days after
it's passage and publication.


Passed the city council January s.
